name: LES MILLS BODYCOMBAT
summary:
New BODYCOMBAT 100 DLC available!

💪 8 new workouts

💯 New game mechanics

🪙 New environment

🥊 Premium cosmetics

Say hello to Mixed Reality. Best App of 2022 award-winner, now with the most innovative experience ever. Available to all Bodycombat owners for free!

Work out at home with a premium fitness app. LES MILLS, the world's leading fitness company, brings the BODYCOMBAT experience to your headset with an extensive workout portfolio, top-quality coaching, innovative mechanics, and different...
